overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a warrior character with a braided ponytail walking through a dark, misty forest at night, passing a torch marker, and emerging into a rocky canyon with distant fires visible on the horizon.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed forest path surrounded by twisted dead trees in near-total darkness. A skull mounted on a pole stands to the right, and a distant torch flame becomes visible ahead, providing the only light source in the dense woods.

passes the lit torch mounted on a wooden post to the left

wooden post with burning flame passed on the left side

dark blue night sky becoming visible above the rocks

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from dense forest to rocky terrain as the character passes a lit torch on a wooden post. Stone formations replace the trees, wooden fence posts appear on the right, and the night sky becomes partially visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon under starry night sky

events.description: enters wide rocky canyon with full sky visibility
distant orange fire glow becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: traversing the open rocky canyon with mist rising from the ground

tall rock walls forming the right side of the canyon
orange-red glow of distant fires or volcanic activity
low-lying fog drifting through the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide rocky canyon under a starry night sky, with tall rock walls on both sides. Mist drifts across the canyon floor, and a distant orange fire glow appears on the right horizon, suggesting volcanic activity or large fires ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dark forest into a vast, open rocky canyon under a starry night sky. It begins on a narrow path enclosed by twisted dead trees and near-total darkness, passing a skull mounted on a pole as a distant torch flame flickers ahead. As the character reaches the lit torch, the dense woods give way to rocky terrain and wooden fence posts, allowing the night sky to gradually reveal itself overhead. The scene then expands as the camera emerges from the tree line into a wide canyon flanked by towering stone walls. Finally, the view opens across a mist-covered canyon floor toward a distant orange glow on the horizon, suggesting large fires in the distance.
